action.description: Bring interface up with no shutdown
AS mismatch requires reverting to baseline configuration
Reset EIGRP metric weights to default
Reset EIGRP metric weights to default
Adjust EIGRP timers to match baseline
Adjust EIGRP timers to match baseline
Process ID mismatch requires reverting to baseline
Adjust OSPF timers to match neighbors

commands: # NOTE: May need to clear OSPF process
# Revert to stable configuration with unique router IDs

action.description: Remove incorrect network statement from OSPF
Add missing network statement to OSPF

commands: # Revert to stable configuration for authentication

action.description: Auto-mined: configure_router_id for router id mismatch
Context (R3): configure_timers for eigrp timer mismatch
Context (R6): configure_router_id for router id mismatch
Context (R5): remove_stub_area for unexpected stub area
Context (R5): configure_router_id for router id mismatch
Context (R4): configure_timers for hello interval mismatch
Shut R6 FastEthernet0/0 to isolate TCP flood attack source
Shut R6 FastEthernet0/0 to block OSPF attack traffic

solution.commands:
interface FastEthernet1/0
no shutdown

router eigrp 1
metric weights 0 1 0 1 0 0
end

interface FastEthernet0/0
ip hello-interval eigrp 1 5
ip hold-time eigrp 1 15
end

router eigrp 1
no eigrp stub
end

router eigrp 1
no passive-interface FastEthernet1/0
end

router ospf 10
no passive-interface FastEthernet0/0
end

router ospf 10
router-id 6.6.6.6
end
# NOTE: May need to clear OSPF process: clear ip ospf process

router ospf 10
no area 1 stub
end

router ospf 10
no network 192.168.10.0 0.0.0.255 area 1
network 192.168.10.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
end

router ospf 10
network 192.168.10.0 0.0.0.255 area 0
end

router ospf 10
router-id 5.5.5.5
end
# NOTE: May need to clear OSPF process: clear ip ospf process

interface Serial0/0
ip ospf hello-interval 10
ip ospf dead-interval 40
end

interface FastEthernet1/0
no shutdown

router eigrp 1
no eigrp stub
end

router eigrp 1
no passive-interface FastEthernet1/0
